# Cedar Lux Properties

> Custom luxury home builder on Cedar Creek Lake, Texas — 60 minutes from Dallas. Specializing in bespoke waterfront homes and spec builds at Emerald Bay and across Cedar Creek Lake.

Cedar Lux Properties builds custom lakefront homes on Cedar Creek Lake, TX, with a focus on waterfront design, quality construction, and the Emerald Bay community. Based in Mabank, TX.

Contact: 972-764-8687, info@cedarluxproperties.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://cedarluxproperties.com/): Overview, featured properties, and company introduction
- [The Collection](https://cedarluxproperties.com/collection): Full listing of available homes, lots, and floor plans
- [Emerald Bay](https://cedarluxproperties.com/emerald-bay): Cedar Lux's flagship waterfront community on Cedar Creek Lake
- [Cedar Creek Lake](https://cedarluxproperties.com/cedar-creek-lake): Overview of the broader Cedar Creek Lake area and building opportunities
- [About](https://cedarluxproperties.com/about): Company background and team
- [Contact](https://cedarluxproperties.com/contact): Inquiry form and contact details
